name: beauty-avatar-challenge
description: Telegram Mini App — Beauty Avatar Challenge (Podrygka-inspired)

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.copy:avatar-assets: node scripts/copy-logo.cjs && node scripts/copy-face-parts.cjs && node scripts/copy-skin-bases.cjs && node scripts/copy-generated-avatar-assets.cjs
